Setlist
Full Shows Aired Exclusively on SiriusXM
This is a list of shows that have aired "exclusively" on SiriusXM (this could include multicasts but generally means we're excluding Live Trax airings, etc). This is broken down type:

Live Concert - this is an airing that happened simultaneous to the show
Archive - these are shows that did not air live, but aired in full later. These generally come from the DMB archive
Exclusive - this was a show or an airing that was done specifically for Sirius. This could include airings of Dave solo performances from his home during COVID

Note - the Show Dates for the pre-recorded COVID performances are generally the air date unless specified
Show Date Venue Name and Location First Air Date Airing Type Notes
